stages.name: targeted_unit_tests
stages.evidence: property_generator_test covers: the same seed emits an identical 256-draw sequence while a neighbouring seed diverges within 16 draws; the forAllU64 support helper records the seed, generated case count, and a reproducible first-failing counterexample deterministically; a failed property report that records seed list, invariant category, generator case count, shrink status, and a minimized counterexample is accepted; a failed property without a counterexample is rejected (failed_without_counterexample); a report whose status disagrees with its property results is rejected (status_mismatch); missing property evidence on a high-risk property_required task is rejected (empty_property_required); a not_property_required skip report is accepted; the task 062 property artifact is contract-valid; and every task-044 valid fixture is accepted while every invalid fixture is rejected; full suite green

stages.name: determinism_tests
stages.evidence: the generator is a pure splitmix64 stream over the seed with no wall-clock, OS randomness, or global state, so Generator.init(seed) is reproducible byte-for-byte; the report validator is a pure function of the parsed JSON value and returns the first contract violation deterministically; report status is derived (failed iff a property failed) rather than asserted

stages.name: property_tests
stages.evidence: task 062 emits real generated property evidence: seeded_generator_determinism (invariant Determinism, seeds [99, 12648430, 12648431], 256 generated cases) and forall_counterexample_reproducibility (invariant Determinism, seed 99, 64 generated cases); both pass with shrinking not_triggered and the report validates against zentinel.property.report

stages.name: mutation_checks
stages.reason: task 062 adds deterministic generator + validator infrastructure; self-mutation dogfood of the mutation engine is gated to the Phase 7 stages (task 085). The new surface is deterministic-core and is covered by unit, determinism, and the full property fixture sweep.

residual_risk: The property report contract is enforced by the Zig validator src/property/report.zig (zentinel.property.report) rather than a registered JSON Schema; zentinel.pipeline.property_report.v1 is intentionally absent from docs/SCHEMA_REGISTRY.md, which schemas/ scope owns. The validator is exercised against the full task-044 valid/invalid fixture suite to anchor it to the frozen shape.

The seeded generator is a minimal splitmix64 stream intended for structural property coverage (ordering, IDs, cache keys); it is not a general-purpose program generator and does not choose a third-party property dependency, per the task non-goals.

Shrinking is reported but optional: properties record shrinking.status (not_triggered, minimized, or unsupported) and a failed property must carry a minimized or unsupported shrink status plus a counterexample, so missing shrink evidence on a failure is rejected.
